case_title: MICHAEL SMITH VS. PATRICIA JANE SMITH

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,193.00 FILED BY SMITH, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, PATRICIA JANE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: PLANTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECD AT WINDOW & SUBMITTED
PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, ADVANCED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION FROM JUN-15-2022 TO SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM CALENDAR ON JUN-14-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. MATTER IS NOT PROPERLY IN SMALL CLAIMS DEPARTMENT. PLAINTIFF MUST FILE IN UNIFIED FAMILY COURT. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL SMITH IS PRESENT.
